message:
fix: ensure stream is shut down on fatal postgres drain errors and correct HTTP serialization test

- In Postgres connection handling, manually marking the connection as closed
  without shutting down the underlying TCP stream would lead to missing FIN packets
  when the connection is dropped, because the Drop impl skips shutdown if closed == true.
  Now we explicitly call `shutdown(Both)` before manually setting closed to true.
- Fix flawed test logic in `response_head_serialize_strips_crlf_from_reason` that asserted
  against the presence of the "X-Injected" text payload instead of the CRLF injection.
